selection_reason: These two buckets explain the largest visual gap: generated sheet has 25 visible DisplayDims versus 12 in the reference and long cross-region dimension lines. Fixing title/notes first would not resolve the dominant UI screenshot failure.
allowed_code_areas: drawing layout / dimension arrange related code

implementation_plan.intent: Reject/carry blockers when final visible DisplayDim count exceeds the reference-intent cap after prune/repair, instead of accepting an over-dense but semantically covered sheet.
Add an offline-detectable reference-lane geometry guard for long diagonal/cross-region dimension leaders so future reruns fail before UI review if the same lane pattern reappears.

acceptance_expectations.next_required_final_gate: Drawing Review UI screenshot manual/visual judgement

risk_control.affects_other_samples: Potentially yes for dimension arrange/generator shared behavior; guard will be tied to reference-intent/UI defect policy and covered by 006-focused tests before rerun.
risk_control.rollback: Revert the changed generator/dimension arrange guard commits and regenerated diagnostics; no original CAD files are modified.
